title: Basic test failed after install in cygwin
body:
Hello,

I tried install verilator for cygwin as below:

% git clone https://github.com/verilator/verilator verilator_cygwin
% cd verilator_cygwin
% git pull
% git tag
% autoconf
% ./configure
% make
% make test

when I ran it, I can see below but I am trying to install 
        #vlt/t_a1_first_cc: %Error: Exec of make failed: ccache g++  -I. -Wall -Wextra -Wfloat-conversion -Wlogical-op -Werror -MMD -I/home/sunki/projects/examples/verilator/verilator_cygwin/test_regress/../include -I/home/sunki/projects/examples/verilator/verilator_cygwin/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -std=c++14 -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc.h>" -DT_A1_FIRST_CC   -O0 -c -o Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o ../../obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/Vt_a1_first_cc__main.cpp
                make && test_regress/t/t_a1_first_cc.pl  --vlt
TESTS DONE, FAILED: Passed 0  Failed 1  Unsup 0  Time 0:13
make: *** [Makefile:165: smoke-test] Error 10


% make install

After install, I am trying run verilator_basics as below:
% verilator -Wall --trace -cc alu.sv --exe tb_alu.cpp
% make -C obj_dir -f Valu.mk Valu

but there are error as below:
make: Entering directory '/home/sunki/projects/examples/verilator/verilator_basics/obj_dir'
ccache g++  -I. -Wall -Wextra -Wfloat-conversion -Wlogical-op -Werror -MMD -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -std=c++14 -Os -c -o tb_alu.o ../tb_alu.cpp
In file included from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.h:878,
                 from ../tb_alu.cpp:5:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_funcs.h: In function ‘IData VL_CMP_NN(const string&, const string&, bool)’:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_funcs.h:2158:16: error: ‘strcasecmp’ was not declared in this scope; did you mean ‘strncmp’?
 2158 |         return VL_STRCASECMP(lhs.c_str(), rhs.c_str());
      |                ^~~~~~~~~~
      |                strncmp
make: *** [Valu.mk:61: tb_alu.o] Error 1
make: Leaving directory '/home/sunki/projects/examples/verilator/verilator_basics/obj_dir'

Would you please let me what I need do to fix it? did I missed anything when I install?

Thank you,
Sun Kim
